body.title: Golden test vector — minimal first version

_test_keypair_note: 0.2.0 receipt-bearing form of golden-context.json (RFC-ACDP-0010). The body and its signature are byte-identical to golden-context.json (sig-001 test producer keypair, seed = 32 zero bytes). The registry_receipt is REAL: its signature is Ed25519 over the ASCII bytes of the receipt hash (JCS of the receipt minus 'signature', SHA-256, 'sha256:' prefix) under the rcpt-001 registry test keypair (seed = 32 bytes of 0x11, public key d04ab232742bb4ab3a1368bd4615e4e6d0224ab71a016baf8520a332c9778737). key_fingerprint is SHA-256 over the producer's raw 32-byte public key. Both keypairs are TEST-ONLY. The conformance runner verifies this example end-to-end against rcpt-001.
